title: Inverter Response Law: Symbolic Regression with Extrapolation Hold-out
strategies: constant baseline: emit the mean of the training targets (no structure, ~0.1)
affine least-squares: fit y ~ w.x + b; captures first-order trend, extrapolates poorly
poly-exp family fit: grid the single exp rate, solve linear coefficients for x0*exp(b*x1)+x2^2+x3^2+x0*x3 -> recovers the law
sparse/simple surrogate: trade accuracy for a lower complexity penalty on the RMSE+complexity objective
